final_answer.response: The proposed method uses a shallow-feature fusion module in the segmentation head.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content:
• This paper proposes a method for real-time semantic segmentation of drones that integrates multi-scale global context information.
• The method utilizes a UNet structure with a Resnet18 network as the encoder and incorporates a global–local attention module.

sections.title: Method
sections.content:
• The method uses a shallow-feature fusion module in the segmentation head.
• The model was tested on the UAvid and UDD6 datasets.

sections.title: Results
sections.content:
• The method achieved an accuracy of 68% mIoU on the UAvid dataset.
• The method achieved an accuracy of 67% mIoU on the UDD6 dataset.
• The method achieved a real-time performance of 72.4 frames/s.

sections.title: Limitations
sections.content:
• The method may not be suitable for all types of drone imagery.
• The method may require additional training data for optimal performance.
